issues.title: add deepseek chat model support
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, the feature you are about to request might have already been requested.

**Expected Behavior**
org.springframework.ai.chat.messages.Message  add reasoning_content

comments.body:
Thank you for opening this issue, @walle1027.  

There is already a PR open to resolve this: [#2192](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/2192).  

Additionally, there is another issue [#2283](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/2283) with the same expectation.
You can also use Deepseek models via Ollama.
I am closing this as there are several other issues on the same topic.  Search for remaining deepseek issues and there are some comments on how we will proceed to handle supporting deepseek.
